heading: Additional subscription to shares; authorization of appropriations
label: 285s Additional subscription to shares; authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments1981—Subsec. (a). substituted “effective only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriation Acts” for “made only after the amount required for such subscription has been appropriated”.Pub. L. 97–35

Effective DateSection effective , except that no funds authorized to be appropriated by this section may be available for use or obligation prior to , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 3, 1977Oct. 1, 1977section 1001 of Pub. L. 95–118section 282i of this title
amendments: Amendments1981—Subsec. (a). substituted “effective only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriation Acts” for “made only after the amount required for such subscription has been appropriated”.Pub. L. 97–35

Effective Date of 1981 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except that any funds authorized to be appropriated shall not be available for use or obligation prior to , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. children.label: a
children.text: The United States Governor of the Bank is authorized to subscribe on behalf of the United States to sixty-seven thousand and five hundred additional shares of the capital stock of the Bank: , That any subscription to additional shares shall be effective only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriation Acts.Provided, however

children.label: b
children.text: In order to pay for the increase in the United States subscription to the Bank provided for in this section, there are authorized to be appropriated without fiscal year limitation $814,286,250 for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury.
